text:
さすがだぜ！
おたくに勝る手本はねーな！

２００年どころか一瞬で
つかませてもらったぜ！

あ、もちろんテクニカルな話で
心意気の話じゃねーけどな……

いつもありがとうな！
ここらで一発オレもドカン

There ya go again!
No one's found a way to beat　you yet, pal!

But forget 200 years. I had an epiphany!
I know how you do it.

On a technical level, I mean. Still workin' on
finding the right kinda spirit.

Thanks, as always! I feel ready to take some
enemies out with a bang!
